_inspectorSnowReport.Report:
2/26/26 3:00PM Update: 
Good afternoon skiers and riders! After a period of snowy weather, we once again saw partly cloudy skies. The snowfall this week drastically improved skiing conditions and allowed for some modest terrain expansion. Warm temps on Tuesday put a slight crust on sunny slopes, but lots of soft snow still abounds. Gold hills was re-opened again today but will close at 4pm. Don't forget to stick around for night skiing tonight until 7pm!

Ski Patrol will be conducting avalanche mitigation in Northway and Southback today. Please obey all rope lines, closures, and signage for your own safety and that of our mountain operations personnel. We look forward to opening more terrain as avalanche and snow conditions allow.

Gold Hills is now open until 4pm! 

Terrain Parks: The Discovery Park, Arwine's Jump Line and the new Sudden Drop Park (Lower Arwine's) are open today!

Events: Join us Friday February 27th for Rafters Happy Hour from 3-5pm. On Saturday February 28th we have Summit Apres: Shuckfest from 3-5pm. This free, all-ages shuck-and-celebrate showdown takes place at the Summit House - aka the best perch on Crystal Mountain to kick back after carving up the slopes. Stop by for our Freeride World Qualifier February 28th from 7am-4PM.  Come out and watch the best freeride athletes in North America compete for a spot on the Freeride World Tour. 

Notes for today:
  1. $199 Spring 3-Day Passes are on sale now! Ski for just $67 a day, any day of the week, for the rest of the season!
  2. Night Skiing hours have been adjusted to 4:00 p.m. to 7 p.m.
  3. We’ve decided to discontinue the parking waitlist for the 25/26 season. Parking reservations are back to first-come, first-served basis, and still required on weekends and holidays
  4. $62 Day tickets continue every Tuesday for the remainder of the season!
  5. Did you know it just takes 5 Days to be entered to win a 26/27 Ikon Pass? Track your days on the Ikon App and register for RIDE TO WIN
  6. Looking to save time and make the most of the day? Consider grabbing a Daily Reserve Upgrade! Available on weekends and holidays, this upgrade grants access to priority lift lines, getting you on the lift faster and allowing you to complete more laps. 
  7. Paid reservations can only be cancelled by emailing SP+ at  CrystalMtnParking@spplus.com with Reservation #, First Name, and Last Name. While you may not receive an immediate reply, the cancellation will be processed. The Crystal Mountain Contact Center cannot process these cancellations.
  8. In case of on-mountain emergency: Call 360-663-3064 or 911

Mountain Weather 2/26/2026 3:30pm 

Forecaster: Bradford Swanson

Synopsis: High pressure remains dominant over the region. We are smashed in the middle of a Jet Stream sandwich, resulting in benign weather. Expect clear skies and warming temps through the weekend. Get your spring fit dialed; it's time to start working on those goggle tans. 

Thursday Night:
Sky Cover: Clear
Freezing Elevation: 4,500’ 
12hr Precip: None
Wind Trends: Moderate, West
Friday:
Sky Cover: Clear
Freezing Elevation: 6,500’
12hr Precip: None
Wind Trends: Moderate to Strong, West
Friday night:
Sky Cover: Clear
Freezing Elevation: 7,000’
12hr Precip: None
Wind Trends: Moderate to Strong, West

Extended: Expect dry weather for the foreseeable future, enjoy the sunshine and spring vibes! 


Uphill Travel Update: See the above banner for the current status. Please visit guest services to get your 25/26 uphill travel card. This must be renewed free of charge for the season. Uphill travel may be prohibited at any time as mountain operations teams conduct avalanche mitigation. Refer to the "No Uphill Travel" lights around the base area and the Mountain Report page indicating the status of the designated route. These lights are located by the Gondola trail map, at the bottom of Chinook, at the bottom of Discovery, and at the top of the Quicksilver lift shack. For more information about uphill travel, please visit the uphill travel page. 

25/26 WINTER PROGRAMS, CLINICS, AND NECESSITIES

  • Ski and Ride School: Explore our programs and find the right fit for you.
  • AIARE Course & Certification: Ski the backcountry with expert knowledge and certification
  • Seasonal Gear storage: Hassle-free on-mountain storage with limited availability. Lock your space in today!
  • Seasonal Lockers: For you or your entire family, check out options today.
  • Full Day Seasonal Lesson Programs for 4-6 year olds are now available- with lunch included too!  Secure your spot. Already signed up for a 2-hour session and want to upgrade? No problem—just call us at 833-279-7895
